dead_routes.reason: Client POSTs crash reports to `${apiBase}/analytics/crashes` but no backend route for /analytics/crashes existed.
dead_routes.fix_applied: Added analyticsRoutes() in backend/src/routes/analytics.ts, registered in server.ts under /v1 prefix.

dead_routes.reason: Client POSTs queued events to `${apiBase}/analytics/events` but no backend route existed.

ghost_features.reason: Client ShopScene catalog lists sku_id='monthly_card' but backend SKU_CONFIG had no 'monthly_card' key.
ghost_features.fix_applied: Added monthly_card entry to backend/src/types/index.ts SKU_CONFIG with is_monthly_card=true, product_id=com.glowisland.iap.monthly_card, amount_cents=499.

ghost_features.reason: Backend SKU_CONFIG defines 'first_pack' and 'glowstone_chest' not present in client ShopScene catalog.
ghost_features.fix_applied: No action — backend may offer these via direct link or future shop update. Not blocking.

All 17 SFX files verified present in game-client/assets/resources/audio/sfx/
